title: Yowzakar #3108
definition:
Jozachar = "Jehovah remembers"

 1) a servant of king Joash of Judah and one of his murderers
    1a) also called 'Zabad'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jozachar = "Jehovah remembers"

 1) a servant of king Joash of Judah and one of his murderers
    1a) also called 'Zabad'

    NASB:  the LORD has remembered, murderer of King Joash
